mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM cd_indent WHERE state = #{type}
SELECT b.`name` FROM app_claim_teacher as a LEFT JOIN app_user as b on a.user_id = b.id WHERE a.state = 1 AND a.type = 1 AND a.current_position is not null
SELECT id FROM cd_indent WHERE plate = #{plate}
SELECT DISTINCT IFNULL(SUM(payment),0) from cd_indent WHERE DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m') = #{time}
SELECT DISTINCT IFNULL(SUM(accessories_amount),0) from cd_indent WHERE DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m') = #{time}
SELECT DISTINCT IFNULL(SUM(fee_money),0) from cd_indent WHERE DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m') = #{time}
SELECT DISTINCT IFNULL(SUM(work_price),0) from cd_repair_order WHERE DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m') = #{time}
SELECT DISTINCT IFNULL(SUM(business_commission),0) from cd_indent WHERE DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m') = #{time}
SELECT DISTINCT IFNULL(SUM(payment),0) from cd_indent WHERE DATE_FORMAT(update_time,'%Y-%m') = #{time}
SELECT DISTINCT IFNULL(SUM(accessories_amount),0) from cd_indent WHERE DATE_FORMAT(update_time,'%Y-%m') = #{time}
SELECT DISTINCT IFNULL(SUM(fee_money),0) from cd_indent WHERE DATE_FORMAT(update_time,'%Y-%m') = #{time}
SELECT DISTINCT IFNULL(SUM(business_commission),0) from cd_indent WHERE DATE_FORMAT(update_time,'%Y-%m') = #{time}
